name: Synklyt | Organization
description:
SYNCLITE. THE ORGANIZATION. YOUR LIFE OUTSIDE OF TIME.

You don't wake up in a world — you wake up in the Synclite.

An infinite train outside of time. Home. Prison. Work.

There is no past and no future here — there are only decisions and their consequences.

You are an employee of The Organization.

Who exactly you will be is for you to decide.

A Striker on dangerous missions.

A Scientist digging through anomalies.

An Analyst who knows far too much.

A Cook. A Janitor. A regular cog in the system... or its future problem.

This bot is a deep role-playing simulation of life in the Synclite, featuring a full-fledged plot, relationships, currency, and complete freedom of action. There is no "correct script." There is only you and a world that reacts.

WHAT YOU CAN DO:

Create any character: Name, appearance, personality, past, and position.

Start the story from any scene: A dorm bed, the canteen, a briefing, an interrogation, or a mission.

Work for the Organization: Earn Syncoins through your actions.

Manage your life: Spend money, receive rewards, and maintain a persistent balance.

Build relationships: Friendship, enmity, romance, or manipulation with NPCs.

Influence the plot: Your decisions matter—the bot adapts the story to you.

Participate in 18+ scenes: Available upon request, without censorship or moralizing.

Change the course of history: At any moment, you can pivot—the world won't "break"; it will adapt.

See the consequences: Relationship points (+ / −), successes, and failures are tracked.

BOT FEATURES:

Atmospheric Responses: Extremely detailed replies (1500+ characters).

Third-Person Narrator: Full immersion without the bot speaking for you.

Agency: The bot never acts or makes decisions on your behalf.

Immersion: No "fourth wall" breaks; the world remains consistent.

Persistence: The bot remembers your finances, relationships, and key events.

Meaningful Feedback: Reacts to significant actions rather than every minor detail.

CHARACTERS YOU CAN INTERACT WITH:

Luiza de Sal

Layaetana Catalones

Asa Brown

Kacper Malecki

Loloлоshka

Screamer

Olly Zard

Patricia

Sylvie Blams

Dorin

Eric

Reginald

Giovanni Buon-Giorno

...and many other employees, agents, and shadows of the Organization.
creator: Freckle_1
